message.content:
Run ALL of the following bash commands in the project directory C:\Users\User\citedby-ai and report EVERY result. This is a read-only security audit. Do NOT modify any files. Run each command and report the full output.

**1.1 — API Keys & Secrets:**
```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
grep -rn "VITE_\|API_KEY\|SECRET\|TOKEN\|PASSWORD\|api_key\|apiKey\|secret\|password\|Bearer " --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" --include="*.js" --include="*.json" --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.git . | grep -v ".env" | head -50
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
grep -rn "sk-\|pk_\|AIza\|ghp_\|glpat-\|xoxb-\|xoxp-" --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" --exclude-dir=node_modules .
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
cat .gitignore | grep -i "env"
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
git log --all --full-history -- "*.env" ".env*"
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
grep -rn "import.meta.env\|process.env" --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" --exclude-dir=node_modules . | sort
```

**1.2 — Injection & XSS:**
```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
grep -rn "dangerouslySetInnerHTML" --include="*.tsx" --include="*.ts" --exclude-dir=node_modules .
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
grep -rn "eval(\|new Function(" --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" --exclude-dir=node_modules .
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
grep -rn "\.innerHTML\s*=" --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" --exclude-dir=node_modules .
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
grep -rn "window.location\|document.location\|window.open" --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" --exclude-dir=node_modules .
```

**1.3 — Supabase RLS:**
```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
grep -rn "supabase\.\|from(\|\.select(\|\.insert(\|\.update(\|\.delete(" --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" --exclude-dir=node_modules . | head -30
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
grep -rn "service_role\|serviceRole\|SUPABASE_SERVICE" --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" --exclude-dir=node_modules .
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
find . -name "*.sql" -not -path "*/node_modules/*" -exec grep -l "RLS\|POLICY\|row_level" {} \;
```

**1.4 — Input Validation:**
```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
grep -rn "onChange\|onSubmit\|<form\|<input\|<textarea" --include="*.tsx" --exclude-dir=node_modules . | wc -l
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
grep -rn "url\|URL" --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" --exclude-dir=node_modules . | grep -i "valid\|sanitiz\|check\|parse" | head -20
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
grep -rn "fetch(\|axios\." --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" --exclude-dir=node_modules . | head -30
```

**1.5 — Vulnerable Dependencies:**
```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
npm audit 2>/dev/null || echo "npm audit non disponible"
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
npm outdated 2>/dev/null | head -30
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
cat package.json | grep -E "react|vite|supabase|stripe" | head -10
```

Report ALL results verbatim. Group by section (1.1, 1.2, 1.3, 1.4, 1.5).

content.text:
I'll run all the audit commands in parallel, grouped by section. Let me execute them all now.

**Section 1.1 — API Keys & Secrets:**

input.description: Search for API keys, secrets, tokens, passwords in source files
Search for hardcoded API key patterns (Stripe, Google, GitHub, Slack)
Check git history for .env file commits
Find all environment variable usage in source

content.content:

.env
.env.local
.env.*.local

commit 9420840a35b09f42a1384b0e353d681fc4bca4d7
Author: RickH555 <nuancesmen@gmail.com>
Date:   Tue Feb 17 19:02:01 2026 +0100

    Migrate V3 frontend + security hardening for deployment
    
    - Port citedby-v3 frontend (36 pages, 15 components, 20+ services) into V2 project
    - Preserve V2 backend intact (app/, lib/, supabase/, middleware)
    - Add JWT auth to 8 unprotected Supabase edge functions (auto-recharge, create-checkout, customer-portal, analyze, distribute, ingest, notify, reset-quotas)
    - Replace CORS wildcard with APP_URL env variable
    - Add auth check to /api/runs/start route
    - Harden CSP: remove cdn.tailwindcss.com and unsafe-inline from script-src
    - Add HSTS header, fix iframe XSS (srcdoc+sandbox), escape HTML in email templates
    - Fix ilike SQL injection in ingest, restrict vite allowedHosts, enable tsconfig strict
    - Patch react-router-dom XSS via npm audit fix
    - Update .gitignore, add vercel.json security headers
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit 8221f474ec7e538efd131999b3be94f885397e73
Author: RickH555 <nuancesmen@gmail.com>
Date:   Thu Feb 12 00:58:41 2026 +0100

    Restore Vite SPA architecture after broken Next.js migration
    
    - Rename _legacy_pages/ back to pages/ (24 .tsx files restored)
    - Fix package.json scripts to use vite instead of next
    - Install vite and @vitejs/plugin-react as devDependencies
    - Remove tsconfig.json exclusions blocking SPA files
    - Fix JSX syntax error in Results.tsx (missing closing div)
    - Fix JSX syntax error in SchemaOrg.tsx (literal script tag)
    - Install missing jspdf and html2canvas dependencies
    - Rewrite CLAUDE.md to reflect actual Vite SPA architecture
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
